issues.title: Enemy dealt 49 dmg (74% of 66 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 20 (seq 269), the enemy dealt 49 damage which is 74% of the player's 66 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 45 dmg (100% of 45 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 21 (seq 273), the enemy dealt 45 damage which is 100% of the player's 45 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-1)
issues.description: 3 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E0:100HP, F1E1:94HP, F1E2:91HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: 4 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-2)
issues.description: 4 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E0:100HP, F1E1:94HP, F1E2:91HP, F2E0:98HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: 5 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-2)
issues.description: 5 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E0:100HP, F1E1:94HP, F1E2:91HP, F2E0:98HP, F2E1:100HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 (the_curator)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against the_curator (boss). Accuracy was 70% with 21 turns played. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce early floor enemy HP/damage or activate canary system earlier for struggling profiles.

issues.title: Player defeated despite 69% accuracy
issues.description: Player was defeated with an overall accuracy of 69%, well above the 60% threshold. This suggests the player knew the material but the game's damage/healing balance is too punishing. Dying despite knowledge mastery feels unfair.
reproductionSteps: Review enemy damage scaling vs. healing/shield availability
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce enemy damage or increase healing for players above 60% accuracy (canary system integration).

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 2: 21 turns vs prev floor avg 6.7
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 took 21 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 6.7 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: the_curator (boss).

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 17 in floor 3 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 3, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 17. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (194 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
